allow: Bash(curl -s -m 5 -o /dev/null -w "POST /webhook status: %{http_code}\\n" -X POST http://localhost:3005/webhook -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"entry":[{"changes":[{"value":{"contacts":[{"profile":{"name":"Ravi Shop"}}],"messages":[{"from":"919000000000","type":"text","text":{"body":"Ravi shop ki 5 rice bags, 3 oil"}}]}}]}]}')

PowerShell($ports = 3000,3001; foreach \($p in $ports\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Write-Output "Port $p : IN USE \(PID $\($c.OwningProcess -join ','\)\)" } else { Write-Output "Port $p : free" } })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Write-Output "Port 3000: LISTENING \(PID $\($c.OwningProcess -join ','\)\)"; try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:3000/health -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "health -> $h" } catch { Write-Output "health request FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } else { Write-Output "Port 3000: NOT listening \(backend exited\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://voice-order-backend-production.up.railway.app/health" -TimeoutSec 25; "HEALTH OK:"; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } catch { "HEALTH FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\sheks\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\EDP\\voice-order-app\\backend"; "Backend dir exists: $\(Test-Path $dir\)"; if \(Test-Path $dir\) { Set-Location $dir }; "--- whoami ---"; try { railway whoami } catch { "whoami error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "--- status ---"; try { railway status } catch { "status error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; [print\(json.loads\(l\)\) for l in sys.stdin if l.strip\(\)]")

PowerShell(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\sheks\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-sheks-OneDrive-Desktop-EDP\\170e35e9-4d2a-4e31-9b07-6a6f23ef138d.jsonl" | ForEach-Object { $j = $_ | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($j.type -eq 'user' -or $j.type -eq 'assistant'\) { $c = $j.message.content; if \($c -is [string]\) { "[$\($j.type\)] $c" } else { foreach \($p in $c\) { if \($p.type -eq 'text'\) { "[$\($j.type\)] $\($p.text\)" } } } } } | Out-String -Width 4000)

PowerShell($files = @\('eab95c57-bfd9-4ce3-932e-fdb9e1b38ba1','965c6420-5341-40fb-81b7-140a2b61c506','6a7e6f36-124a-45c9-ac3b-f5cb1d90ff46'\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $hits = Select-String -Path "C:\\Users\\sheks\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-sheks-OneDrive-Desktop-EDP\\$f.jsonl" -Pattern 'problem' -SimpleMatch; "$f : $\($hits.Count\) lines mention 'problem'" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3210 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force -Confirm:$false; "killed pid $\($conn.OwningProcess\)" } else { "no listener on 3210" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1800; $k = Invoke-RestMethod 'http://localhost:3210/api/khata'; $l = $k.customers | Where-Object { $_.key -eq '919000000003' }; "total=$\($k.total_outstanding\) owing=$\($k.customers_owing\) due=$\($k.reminders_due\)"; "lakshmi balance=$\($l.balance\) claim=$\([bool]$l.claim_text\) days=$\($l.days_due\)"; $led = Invoke-RestMethod 'http://localhost:3210/api/khata/c/919000000003'; "ledger entries=$\($led.entries.Count\) \(order + voice payment\)")

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3210 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force -Confirm:$false; "demo server stopped" })

PowerShell($idx = "C:\\Users\\sheks\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-sheks-OneDrive-Desktop-EDP\\memory\\MEMORY.md"; $c = [IO.File]::ReadAllText\($idx, [Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $c = $c -replace [regex]::Escape\('- [Udhaar khata plan \(NEXT BUILD\)]\(voice-order-app-udhaar-khata-plan.md\) - chosen 2026-06-11: credit ledger + WhatsApp reminders on existing app; spec in implementationplan4.md; awaiting go'\), '- [Udhaar khata Phase 1 \(BUILT\)]\(voice-order-app-udhaar-khata-plan.md\) - code complete + locally verified 2026-06-11; pending: Supabase plan-4 migration, redeploy, Meta reminder template'; [IO.File]::WriteAllText\($idx, $c, \(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\)\)\); "memory index updated")

PowerShell(foreach \($port in 3000, 3001\) { $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn[0].OwningProcess -Force -Confirm:$false; "killed listener on $port" } else { "port $port free" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $k = Invoke-RestMethod 'http://localhost:3000/api/khata'; "backend OK — outstanding=₹$\($k.total_outstanding\) owing=$\($k.customers_owing\) reminders_due=$\($k.reminders_due\)"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest 'http://localhost:3001/khata' -UseBasicParsing; "frontend OK — HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)")
